subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of My Heart! The epistle of that honoured personage, the distinguished teacher, upon him be the Glory of God and His mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی دستخط حضرت آقای معظم حضرت مبلغ علیه بهاء الله و رحمته و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
